extensions.name: Image Analyzer
extensions.description: Object detection and image analysis with dashboard component. Supports JPEG, PNG, and WebP formats.
extensions.author: NeoMind

extensions.name: Weather Forecast
extensions.description: Real-time weather data using Open-Meteo API. Cross-platform WASM extension with dashboard widget.
extensions.author: NeoMind Team

extensions.name: YOLO Video Processor
extensions.description: Real-time video stream processing with YOLO object detection. Supports RTSP, RTMP, HLS, Camera, File, and Screen sources.
extensions.author: NeoMind
